checkin.journal:
Feeling a bit overwhelmed in the morning with all the work but it was fine, spoke to Vane regarding my procedures and I think its good to hear him a little here and there

Beach time was amazing, sauna really felt good, and I feel good in the evening. Maybe I should have done a jump in the sea every day. Maybe this is how I should start the day or something idk.
bloating 3/10
